case_title: NOGARA REPORTING SERVICE OWNER JANET NOGARA VS LAW OFF/OF PHYLLIS E. ANDELIN PHYLLIS ANDELIN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $546.70 FILED BY NOGARA REPORTING SERVICE OWNER JANET NOGARA AS TO DEFENDANT LAW OFF/OF PHYLLIS E. ANDELIN PHYLLIS ANDELIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-13-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NOGARA REPORTING SERVICE OWNER JANET NOGARA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LAW OFF/OF PHYLLIS E. ANDELIN PHYLLIS ANDELIN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LAW OFF/OF PHYLLIS E. ANDELIN PHYLLIS ANDELIN
